feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Global assignment - business rule
entry.content:
Hello dear experts,

We have initiated shot-term assignments for some colleagues who will be staying in Germany for a period of time and have noticed that on the Home profile, the employee group should have automatically changed from Employee to Expatriate and did not. 

We created a business rule but seems to not work as expected. 

Any guidance would be appreciated.

Thank you,

entry.title: From SF EC - ONB to Microsoft
entry.content:
A client of mine have configured the Microsoft enterprise app, SuccessFactors to Microsoft Active Directory User Provisioning to facilitate future hires from EC and active employments for transfers / rehire with a new active employment.

The issues they are facing: 
 
* When onboarding employees reach startDate - all data are populated, but when the onboardee is in the preboarding phase, they only get a limited amount of data for future hires, PersonIDExternal, startDate, phoneNumber, countryCode.

Does anyone have experience with this? 

All input appreciated!

entry.title: Create new recurring pay component entry with business rule
entry.content:
Hi community,

I am facing an issue right now, where I want to calculate the amount of a new recurring pay component based on another existing pay component. 

Imagine we have pay components A and B. Any user has an existing entry with pay component A. I built an onSave rule, which sets the amount of pay component B to x% of the amount of pay component A. If I try to apply this rule, I get an error, that the necessary pay component is not available. This refers to pay component B, because the user does not have a pay component B yet. If I create an entry with pay component B with any amount, the rule applies and overwrites the amount with the correct number.

Error Message

My question is: is there any way to build the onSave rule in that way, that it creates a pay component B entry in the first place and calculates the correct amount afterwards? Or do you know any other workaround which could solve my issue?

I hope my description was clear enough for you to understand my problem. If not, I am very happy to share further information/ explanation!

Thanks in advance and all the best,
Christian

entry.title: API extract all departments including head / manager of department
entry.content:
Hi 

This may be impossible, but we export all departments with legal entity from Employee Central via API to build organization hierarchy outside of SAP, but there's no easy way to also retrieve managers of any departments?

I haven't found any link between department and manager for employees in the department.

neither an easy way to export a manager and all connected employees through API

entry.title: Business rule in Employee Central to check the start date of an absence under administer time
entry.content: Employee central: I want to write a business rule that checks the start date of the absence record created under the employee's profile - administer time UI, and if the start date is before a specific start date, then an error should be displayed on save.  I checked the sap blogs and see that we need to write a Take Rule, but not sure where to assign this take rule?  Can anyone guide me on this?

entry.title: Can you Restrict Allowed File Type Extensions in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Good day,

Hope you are well.
Is it currently possible to restrict File Type Extensions that employees can upload on fields such as:
Social ID Document.

Thank you!

Kind regards

RDJ

entry.title: Buying & Selling Leaves
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a standard functionality of selling back leaves in SF EC Time management, this should also include integration to ECP and payroll processing for sold leaves. 

Can buying or selling leaves has to be managed in EC Benefits  or EC Time management. 

Thanks

Shilpa

entry.title: EC Alert Email Notifications - Tips to test/preview emails?
entry.content:
Hi all, I was wondering if anyone had any neat tricks or suggestions to send themselves a preview email of EC Alerts, maintained in Manage Data > Alert Messages? 

As these alert messages are tied to business rules which rely on complex scenarios, it would be great to be able to send a preview email somehow, even if it involved creating a dummy business rule to generate the notification, but thought I'd ask on here on the off chance that someone had discovered a nice simple way of achieving this!

Many thanks in advance.

entry.title: Time Account Balances SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a customer requirement regarding time off balances.

  1. Is there a file that we can extract for all employees that will show the account posting data for each day, instead of just the start date and end date?
  2. The below  shows the time account posting for each employee (i exported it under administer time >time account > download near add manual adjustment) but i want it for all employees, Kindly assist

entry.title: To split the workflow based rule into two as the number of workflows in the rule has gone beyond 600
entry.content:
We have a scenario where the workflow based rule is created for Separation module for 32 countries having close to 700 plus workflows segregated based on action types. This is making the rule get overloaded. It takes time to load, to edit and/or make any changes. We still have close to 10 countries to on board for separation module and its making the rule more complicated. Kindly request you to suggest any solution to overcome this problem. Or if you have implemented any solution for the same, requesting you to help with that.  Is there a possibility to split the workflow based business rule into two? 

 

Regards,

Nagavalli B N

entry.title: End user manual and Test Scripts
entry.content:
Hello All

We are looking for an SAP Standard end-user manual and test script for Employee Central.

Example: I am able to find ECP test Scripts in SAP Standard with below link. (The question is: Do we need the same SAP docs on end-user manual and test-scripts in Employee Central)

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_EMPLOYEE_CENTRAL_PAYROLL/e048ab21361042059b71a12d431b4e0f/a40a5a52ab614d3382b18f37dfcba0db.html

Regards

S.K

entry.title: RBP: How to deal with changing assignment of positions - job codes
entry.content:
We are looking for some best practice guidance on RBP tied to positions and job codes.  Our team does not have much experience with clients controlling RBP at the position/job code level.  Forvia is running into issues.

 

Here is the problem:
When HR users get access to SF, it's tied to their position. This works well for managing access - when someone leaves or changes positions, their access is automatically removed. The new person who takes over that position automatically gets the same access.

But there's a catch: If the job code or scope of the position changes later, the automatic permissions might not match what the role actually needs anymore. This means people could end up with incorrect access levels.

 

Is there any best practice or suggestion on how to handle this?  Have you seen this before with other clients and if so, how do they approach it?  Can we setup an alert? Is there any solution we can put into place?

entry.title: Role Name and Family from Job Profile Builder on Employee Profile/EC/Job Info
entry.content:
Hi all, 

We use Job Profile Builder to manage Job Roles and Families. We use Employee Central where everyone has a job code/job classification, which is mapped to the relevant 'Role' entity:

  • Employee has a job code/job classification
  • Job code/job classification is mapped to a Role
  • The Role has a Family as one of its attributes

Each Role entity has a Role Name and belongs to a Family in JPB. What I'd like to know is, is it possible for this Role Name and Family Name to be mapped back to the employee's job info on their employee profile? Family is the main one we're interested in. We also have several downstream integrations where we would like to include the Family as part of the integration file. So we're just exploring what's in the art of the possible currently, and wanted to see if anyone in the community had done something like this already. 

(Another consideration is whether it's possible for the JPB Role Name and Role Family to be brought through into the Position object once the job code has been populated)

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Work Schedule Upload
entry.content:
Hello All

We are trying to upload work schedules for employees (Master data upload) using the template (object work schedule) from import and export data.

The error is '’Template contains more than one association.’’

 Please let us know if the template selection is correct or if any modification is required.

Some one please suggest is there any direct data import template for employee workschedule? or any other templete like Job information related need to be used to import employee work schedule data 

Reg

SK

entry.title: SF EC payslip pay period warning message
entry.content:
Hi dear experts,

We are facing an warning message when click on pay statement. Pay statement can be seen without a problem however a warning message pops up we want to get rid of this warning message. Systems are EC and s4 Hana (not ECP)

All advices are welcome. (Please see the attachment)

Warning message is as it shown below; 

""Warning

We are having trouble displaying your pay periods. Please contact your system administrator and provide the details below:
Error Code: 001
Error Message: undefined
Root Cause: undefined""

entry.title: Second Manager Import in Job relationship - Error: User cannot be their own manager
entry.content:
Hi All

In our current process we maintain Second Manager (Comp Planner) in Job Relationship. In some cases the User himself is their own comp planner.

Until last year we were able to use this solution and import the data successfully in Job Relationship. But after the 1H2024 release SAP has added a validation that User cannot be their own manager. (https://me.sap.com/notes/3460009/E)

We're ready to launch the forms, but we've encountered an error. Has anyone seen this before? If so, what's the best workaround?

Thank you

Viswa

entry.title: Error code 067(PG),
Cutover for EC and Time Off
entry.content:
Hello All

We are preparing for Cutover activities (Test) with a full load. We are almost done with EC. For time off, we are stuck with the template to import employee data for the work schedule. Could you please advise is there any template available for Employee work schedule data import, or do we need to do it in employee Job data import 

 

Reg

SK

entry.title: pay range in position
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to configure pay ranges on position by following below instructions as mentioned in this

KBA - 2458839 - How to Configure Pay Range in Positions - Employee Central - SAP for Me

how ever I see pay range is displayed on the fly before entering the values at position, but I do not see pay range getting displayed once after position has saved.

I have configured the business rule as shown below

I have saved the rule under manage data - object configuration as shown below

I have saved the rule also under configure object definitions - position - company field as shown below

with this configuration steps in place, now that I am trying to either create a new position or modify an existing position under manage data tool. as you can see pay range is also getting displayed

but once the position creation is done, the value at pay range disappears unfortunately.

Any reason what was missing here?

entry.title: connection options between S/4 Hana Private Cloud and SSFF?
entry.content:
Is there any other option besides SAP Ruter to integrate S/4 Hana Private Cloud and SAP SuccessFactors (SSFF) and if so, what would it be?

Is it possible to do it with CPI?
